source: CBR+PNK (authored from setting — no stat block PDF source)
note: CBR+PNK adversaries scale by heat level. threat_level 1-4 maps to crew heat: cold/warm/hot/burnin.

1.name: Street Ganger
1.description: Territory muscle with a spray can and a cheap pistol.
1.weakness: corp authority, better gear, rival gang

1.name: Corp Rent-a-Cop
1.description: Minimum wage security with a flashlight and a radio.

1.name: Drone (Surveillance)
1.description: A hovering eye in the sky. It logs everything.
1.weakness: signal jam, physical destruction, spoof beacon

1.name: ICE (Basic)
1.description: Intrusion Countermeasures — the kind that came preinstalled.

1.name: Fixer Debt Collector
1.description: Shows up when you're late on payments. Professional about it.

2.name: Corp Security Operative
2.description: Trained, augmented, and following a protocol.
2.weakness: EMP, hacking their comms, civilian presence

2.name: Combat Drone
2.description: Armed with a rubber-bullet launcher and a very good camera.
2.weakness: signal jam, EMP burst, heavy cover

2.name: ICE (Hunter)
2.description: Active ICE. It comes to you.

2.name: Gang Lieutenant
2.description: Has cyberware, a crew, and territorial ambition.
2.weakness: rival gang leverage, arrest threat, cutting off supply

2.name: Netrunner Freelance
2.description: Hired to breach your crew's security. Working remotely.
2.weakness: counter-intrusion, physical location exposed, air-gapped gear

3.name: Elite Strike Team
3.description: Full tactical kit, military-grade cyberware, extraction mandate.
3.weakness: civilian crossfire politics, jurisdictional limits, public exposure

3.name: Black ICE (Lethal)
3.description: Kills jacked-in operators. Illegal everywhere. Found everywhere.
3.weakness: physical disconnect, corps-level bypass key, sacrifice decoy node

3.name: Military Contractor Unit
3.description: Private military on a corporate contract. Rules of engagement are loose.
3.weakness: media exposure, counter-contract, collateral damage liability

3.name: Cyborg Enforcer
3.description: More machine than person. Sent when a message needs to be permanent.
3.weakness: EMP, hacking the cyberware, the last scrap of humanity

4.name: Corp Kill Squad
4.description: Off-the-books elimination team. They have your photo, your safe houses, and orders to make it clean.
4.weakness: publicize the contract, mega-corp political trade, complete disappearance

4.name: Rogue AI Fragment
4.description: A distributed intelligence that has decided the crew is a problem. It is everywhere on the net.
4.weakness: isolated subnet, the original kill switch, finding and destroying the core node
